text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back to the academy after a day out,
the sound of lively voices lures us to the shopping
district.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My goodness... a flea market? I see, so that's why
so many people are here.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is that—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Called it! I thought I recognized you two!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ines! Hello. Are you shopping today?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, no. I'm helping out at the market!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
There's a lot of stuff here, plenty of bargains to
find.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My... There really are a lot of items for sale here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Picture books, dolls, accessories... Hehe, I feel as
though I'm a child in a toy store!
choice_data_list: Since we're here, why don't we take a look?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Is that all right with you? Then yes, by all means!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Take your time. If you find anything you
like, feel free to let me know!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hmm. Everything is wonderful. I just can't choose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What do you think, Trainer? Has anything caught
your eye?
choice_data_list:
Maybe this book of prized recipes from
three-star restaurants.

Maybe this piece of colored paper with Gold
Ship's autograph on it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My! I had my eye on that book as well. Every dish
looks exquisite.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Were you thinking of making something from
this?
choice_data_list: Would you try it if I did?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it would be no trouble at all! You should be
aware, however—I'm a bit harsh when it comes to
judging flavor.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh! Did you decide what to buy?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, we found something wonderful! Could we get
a bag for it as well?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ A flea market is certainly nothing to
sneeze at!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Bwah?! Where did they get such a thing?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ah! That's our last one! It's really popular among
families with kids.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Believe me, though, I was shocked myself when
Gold Ship came in to offer them. Haha.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You... have my sympathies.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: So? Should I ring you up?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer? May I have a word with you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I want you to think this over thoroughly...
carefully...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pressured by Mejiro McQueen, I abandon the
idea of buying the autograph.
